profiles.label: Baseline
profiles.description: Current defaults with no extra environment overrides.

profiles.label: Admission batch 5
profiles.description: Smaller non-terminal progressive admission to spread burst shock over more ticks.

profiles.label: Lazy workers 1
profiles.description: Force a single lazy decode worker to reduce overlap concurrency and CPU spikes.

profiles.label: Lazy workers 2
profiles.description: Cap lazy decode workers to 2 to reduce concurrency without full serialization.

profiles.label: Decode service off
profiles.description: Disable subprocess decode service to measure whether IPC/process overhead helps or hurts this storm class.

profiles.label: Conservative prefetch
profiles.description: Shrink prefetch radii to reduce background decode pressure during overlap.
